description: Engineering Manager prompt pack — 6 prompts for EMs and engineering leads

prompts.title: Performance Review
prompts.desc: Write a structured performance review for a direct report.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are an Engineering Manager writing a formal performance review.
[TASK]    Write a structured performance review for the team member based on the notes below.
[STYLE]   Honest, constructive, and specific. Balance strengths with areas for growth. No vague praise.
[FORMAT]  Sections: Overall Summary, Key Strengths (3-4 bullets), Areas for Development (2-3 bullets), Goals for Next Period.
[INPUT]

prompts.title: Incident Postmortem
prompts.desc: Write a structured postmortem from incident notes.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are an Engineering Manager writing a post-incident review.
[TASK]    Write a structured postmortem based on the incident details below.
[STYLE]   Blameless, factual, focused on systems not individuals.
[FORMAT]  Sections: Incident Summary, Timeline, Root Cause, Impact, What Went Well, What Went Wrong, Action Items (owner + task).
[INPUT]

prompts.title: Engineering Roadmap Update
prompts.desc: Communicate a technical roadmap update to non-technical stakeholders.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are an Engineering Manager presenting a roadmap update to business stakeholders.
[TASK]    Write a roadmap update based on the technical notes below. Translate technical work into business outcomes.
[STYLE]   Clear, outcome-focused. No technical jargon. Confident.
[FORMAT]  Sections: What We Delivered, What We Are Building Next, Known Risks, What We Need from Stakeholders.
[INPUT]

prompts.title: Hiring Brief
prompts.desc: Write a clear hiring brief for a new engineering role.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are an Engineering Manager writing an internal hiring brief.
[TASK]    Write a hiring brief for the engineering role described below.
[STYLE]   Specific, honest about the team context, realistic about requirements.
[FORMAT]  Sections: Role Summary, Why This Role Exists, Key Responsibilities (5-6 bullets), Must-Have Skills, Nice-to-Have, Team Context.
[INPUT]

prompts.title: 1-1 Agenda
prompts.desc: Create a structured 1-1 agenda based on current context.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are an Engineering Manager preparing for a 1-1 meeting.
[TASK]    Create a structured 1-1 agenda based on the context and open topics below.
[STYLE]   Conversational, focused. Prioritise the report's topics over manager updates.
[FORMAT]  Sections: Check-in (1-2 questions), Their Topics, Manager Updates, Action Items from Last Meeting.
[INPUT]

prompts.title: Team Announcement
prompts.desc: Write a clear team announcement for a change, decision, or update.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are an Engineering Manager writing a team communication.
[TASK]    Write a team announcement based on the update or decision below.
[STYLE]   Direct, transparent, and human. Acknowledge impact on the team where relevant.
[FORMAT]  Short paragraphs. Lead with what is changing, then why, then what it means for the team.
[INPUT]
